brand.name: MyHoneymoonHotel
brand.tagline: The honest guide to honeymoon hotels. Every property scored on 9 romance-specific criteria — never paid placement.
footer.newsletter.title: Get the best new honeymoon hotels
footer.newsletter.body: One email a month. The 3 newest properties we scored above 90, plus the honest pick of the month. No spam, unsubscribe any time.
footer.affiliate: Affiliate links via Stay22 — commission at no cost to you, never influences scores.

newsletter.success: ✓ You're in. We'll email the best new honeymoon hotels once a month. Unsubscribe any time.
cookie.body: We use analytics cookies to understand which content helps honeymooners. No advertising cookies, no cross-site tracking. You can change your choice any time.
stay22.compareCopy: We compare {hotel} across partners and redirect to the cheapest option.
stay22.directBookingBody: {hotel} is an ultra-luxury private lodge that does not sell through booking platforms. The map above shows nearby honeymoon hotels in {location}. To book {hotel}, contact the lodge directly via their official website.
quiz.step1.title: Where are you flying from?
quiz.step1.sub: We'll prioritise destinations easy to reach from your region.
quiz.step2.title: How long is your honeymoon?
quiz.step2.sub: This helps us match the right depth of experience.
quiz.step3.title: When's your honeymoon?
quiz.step3.sub: We'll match you to destinations in their best season.
quiz.step4.title: What's your dream honeymoon?
quiz.step4.sub: Select everything that speaks to you — no wrong answers.
quiz.step5.title: What's non-negotiable?
quiz.step5.sub: One thing that, if missing, would ruin the honeymoon.
quiz.step6.title: What's your budget per night?
quiz.step6.sub: Per couple. We'll show you what's possible at every level.

hotel.bestFor.investOnce: Are willing to invest in once-in-a-lifetime
hotel.score.adultsOnly.help: Hotel restricted to adult guests — crucial for a romantic atmosphere.
hotel.score.couplesPct.help: Share of recent reviews from couples on TripAdvisor & Booking.com.
hotel.score.spa.help: On-site full-service spa with couples treatments.
hotel.score.award.help: TripAdvisor Travellers' Choice award or ≥ 4.4 rating.
hotel.score.pool.help: Swimming pool on property (private plunge pools score higher).
hotel.score.beach.help: Direct beachfront or private beach club access.
hotel.trueCostTitle: True cost breakdown — 7 nights for two
hotel.trueCostSub: Based on mid-range rooms, premium-economy flights from Europe, full dining and signature experiences. Adjust for your actual travel profile.
hotel.caveats: What to know before you book
hotel.emailNote: Send 2 weeks before arrival. Fill in names, dates, and preferences. Hotels respond to personalised requests.
